summaries.app/models/user.rb: The User model represents a signed-in account, authenticated via Devise. Belongs_to many Memberships and through them many Organizations, supporting the multi-tenant model. Public methods include `admin?` (delegates to the membership flag), `display_name` (falls back to email if name is blank), and a `recent` scope sorted by created_at desc.
summaries.app/controllers/posts_controller.rb: Standard RESTful PostsController scoped to the current organization. Loads @posts via Pundit's policy_scope in #index, authorizes individual records in #show, #edit, #update, #destroy. The #create action delegates to PostCreationService rather than calling Post.create! directly.
summaries.app/services/post_creation_service.rb: Wraps the post-creation workflow: validates the params, creates the Post record inside a transaction, attaches uploaded images via Active Storage, and enqueues NotifyFollowersJob. Returns a Result struct so the controller can branch on `success?` vs `failure_message`.
summaries.config/routes.rb: Mounts the public marketing pages at root, the Devise authentication routes under /users, RESTful resources for posts and comments under /organizations/:organization_id, the admin namespace at /admin (limited to users where admin? returns true), and the RubySage chat widget engine at /ruby_sage.
summaries.db/schema.rb: Schema dump for the application. Core tables: users (Devise), organizations + memberships for multi-tenancy, posts and comments belonging to organizations, and the standard Solid Queue / Cache / Cable infrastructure tables. Also includes ruby_sage_scans and ruby_sage_artifacts for the codebase chat engine.
